title: FLOSS Weekly 371: Booktype
summary:
Booktype allows authors to create beautiful books for print and digital distribution. Publishers use Booktype to manage their entire catalogue in one place, providing authors, translators and proofreaders with all the tools they need.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
